name: FormatVariantAndSourceEvidence
description: In-memory passive document evidence and the real two-adapter seam.
schema_def: FormatVariantDescriptor {variantId, adapterVersion, extractionPolicyVersion, manifestSchemaVersion, supportedMediaType, hardLimits}
PdfDocumentEvidence {sourceFingerprint, byteLength, pages[{pageNumber, width, height, orderedGlyphs[{value, boundingBox, contentOrder}]}]}
SourceRecordEvidence {sourceRecordId, pageNumber, recordOrdinal, recordKind, originalTextEvidence, sourceReference?, rawDateEvidence, rawAmountEvidence, rawControlEvidence}

IStatementAdapter exposes Descriptor, Probe(PdfDocumentEvidence), and Extract(PdfDocumentEvidence, selected-account context). Exactly two implementations are registered in v1 and exactly one probe must match.
